name: Haunted House for Sale
overview: Real estate agent Angel suddenly discovers that her long-lost father has left her a house. However, she could never find her father, and the house itself has been vacant for a long time, with rumors of homeless people dying inside. Just then, Angel takes on the task of the company’s haunted house project. As she deals with each case, she gradually learns about her father’s whereabouts…

trailers.title: 《幸福房屋事件簿》主題預告篇🏠
